data.name: My Demonic Jungle Quest
data.detailed_description:
Yesterday, you were just another warrior in your tribe. Today, you are on the run with the unlikeliest of allies as you race to defeat a great and terrible evil.

My Demonic Jungle Quest is a 2d male protagonist Visual Novel centered around a warrior's journey of discovery after he learns he is marked by powerful entities. Along his journey, he may find romance and much more as he abandons everything he knows on a new, dangerous path.

Language Support

Currently -  Subtitles for Japanese, German, Spanish and Turkish.
data.about_the_game:
Yesterday, you were just another warrior in your tribe. Today, you are on the run with the unlikeliest of allies as you race to defeat a great and terrible evil.

My Demonic Jungle Quest is a 2d male protagonist Visual Novel centered around a warrior's journey of discovery after he learns he is marked by powerful entities. Along his journey, he may find romance and much more as he abandons everything he knows on a new, dangerous path.

Language Support

Currently -  Subtitles for Japanese, German, Spanish and Turkish.
data.short_description: In one night, your simple village life changes. Now you must travel a strange road with a demonic ally, a cute priestess, and a busty hunter. Be careful who you trust, and remember the dark fate that will fall on your village if you fail.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft Windows 11 Home
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen 9 5900HX with Radeon Graphics, 3301 Mhz, 8 Core(s), 16 Logical Processor(s)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Ryzen 9 5900HX with Radeon Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
